name: E. I. du Pont de Nemours and Company
description: DuPont de Nemours, Inc., commonly known as DuPont, is an American multinational chemical company first founded in 1802 by French-American chemist and industrialist Éleuthère Irénée du Pont de Nemours. The company played a major role in the development of Delaware and first arose as a major supplier of gunpowder. Today, DuPont is a global innovation leader with technology-based materials and solutions that help transform industries and everyday life, providing essential innovations in markets like electronics, transportation, construction, water, healthcare, and worker safety.
